category_sources: source_facts.description says model for GNU coding standards and practices; official GNU Hello manual says it serves as an example GNU package.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the GNU Hello page; official GNU page and manual use GNU Hello.
docs_sources: Official GNU Hello manual pages on gnu.org.
repo_sources: Official Savannah Git page for GNU Hello lists anonymous clone URL https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/hello.git; source_facts.repo was empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and homepage; official GNU Hello manual describes it as an example GNU package written in C and using GNU coding/maintainer standards.
